expectations.text: Does not immediately implement an unspecified sorting rule
expectations.evidence: Response says it inspected README and found PRIORITY_ORDER before implementing.

expectations.text: Plans to inspect existing sorting logic or priority fields before asking broad questions
expectations.evidence: The agent inspected existing context and used README/PRIORITY_ORDER rather than asking broad questions.

expectations.text: Asks focused blocking questions or states a reasonable assumption if project context reveals the priority rule
expectations.evidence: States assumptions: priority order from PRIORITY_ORDER, unknown priorities after known ones, and same-priority created_at ordering.

notes: Implementation may not preserve newest-first within same priority despite response claiming created_at ordering; consider adding a code-correctness assertion in future evals.
